name: Lil Cowboy:Treasure Hunt
description: Welcome to Lil Cowboy: Treasure Hunt! A fun and addictive gem matching puzzle game set in the wild west. Embark on an epic adventure as a brave cowboy in search of hidden treasures, rare gems, and gold! Explore beautiful wild west landscapes Collect valuable gems and golden treasures Complete challenging puzzle quests Match 3 or more gems to score points Compete for high scores and achievements Get ready for an exciting journey full of fun, puzzles, and western adventure!
instructions: Desktop Mouse click Mobile Touch down
